title: astragalus ashtianensis
intro: Astragalus ashtianensis is a type of plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to Iran. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus ashtianensis include improving immune function, reducing stress and fatigue, and enhancing overall well-being. Astragalus ashtianensis is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
